title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Dunzo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Dunzo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Dunzo family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Dunzo:
Dunzo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo!
